name: Brooke Rundle
bio: Brooke Rundle is a dedicated music educator and performer with degrees in Flute Performance and Music Education from Central Washington University. She has been inspiring young musicians for the past seven years as a music teacher at Monte Cristo Elementary School. In addition to her work in the classroom, Brooke serves as Co-Director of the Granite Falls High School Marching Band, helping students develop their skills and passion for performance. She is also an active member of the Lake Stevens Community Band, where she plays both flute and piccolo.
